channel.title: Legals on pcidss.ae | PCI DSS Compliance & Payment Security UAE
channel.description: Recent content in Legals on pcidss.ae | PCI DSS Compliance & Payment Security UAE

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

pcidss.ae / NomadX (“we”, “our”, “us”) operates pcidss.ae. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or engage our services.

1. Information We Collect

Information you provide directly:

  • Name and email address (via contact forms)
  • Company name and role
  • Message content submitted through our contact form
  • Information shared during discovery calls or engagements

Information collected automatically:

item.title: Terms of Service
item.description:
Terms of Service

Last updated: March 2026

These terms govern your use of pcidss.ae and any services provided by pcidss.ae / NomadX (“we”, “us”).

1. Use of Website

You may use this website for lawful purposes only. You must not use this site to transmit any material that is unlawful, harmful, or infringes the rights of others.

2. Services

pcidss.ae / NomadX provides PCI DSS compliance consulting, gap analysis, SAQ assistance, and QSA readiness. Specific terms for engagements are documented in individual service agreements or statements of work, which take precedence over these general terms.
